text:
trouble in travel, expenses & loss of
belongings and also difficulties & troubles due to accidents.
4th bhava : A weak & afflicted 8th lord in 4th bhava gives fall from height, problems to partners,
difficulties & expenses due to damages to home. If it is well associated & aspected then
benefits through estate & property.
5th bhava : 8th lord in 5th bhava, gives illness to children, failure in studies. This period is not
good for gambling & lottery. A malefic /week & afflicted 8th lord gives very bad results.
6th bhava : 8th lord in the 6th bhava, gives difficulties, fear and troubles in service. Physical health
is not good.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
44

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
